summary: Expanded the drift audit into a fuller second-theme migration report. The report now adds missing `radius.*`, `opacity.*`, `size.control-*`, and `size.avatar-*` rows; replaces grouped `space.*` prose with discrete naming-mismatch rows; documents Android `size.icon-*` naming drift including the `size.icon-md` value mismatch; and adds a legacy-dependency section covering theme-vs-dimensions schema splits.

acceptance_criteria_evidence.evidence: The report still includes `surface.scrim-soft` and `border.glass` rows with the expected light/dark values.
The report still includes all required `map.*` rows, including `map.style.light` and `map.style.dark`.
The exact string `sizing.stroke` now appears only in the three required table rows, so the verifier returns `3`.
The report still includes `signal.hover` and all required `status.*-tint` rows.
The report keeps Android-specific status coverage and expands the `naming.mismatch` section to discrete `space.*` and `size.icon-*` rows.
The report now covers the previously omitted drift families and explicitly documents schema-level legacy dependencies that block second-theme migration.
